name: system-designer-defaults
purpose: Sensible defaults for interview questions when the user types 'default' or 'skip'. Used by 01_interview_agent.md. Defaults reflect calibrated recommendations for a generic high-stakes SDD project; the interview agent surfaces them with fit % and asks for confirmation.

eu_ai_act_risk.rationale: Conservative default. Most domains we target (healthcare, fintech, legal, public_sector) presume high-risk per Annex III.

role.rationale: Conservative default (since 0.3.2). Covers both Art. 16 (provider) and Art. 26 (deployer) obligations until the user confirms they hold only one role. Affects audit-row sub-selection in 06_eu_ai_act_mapper.md.

special_category_data.rationale: Conservative default (since 0.4.0): assume NO special-category-data processing until user confirms. Setting true triggers GDPR Art. 9 + Annex III(1) biometric audit-row auto-emission in 06_eu_ai_act_mapper.md.

hitl_mode.rationale: Conservative default (since 0.4.0). Per Art. 14 EU AI Act + AESIA Guide 6 §4.2.5, in_the_loop is the strongest oversight mode and the safest baseline for high-risk systems. Users with measured risk + observability may downshift to on_the_loop.

healthcare.rationale: Mature ML/data ecosystem; clinical libraries (pydicom, monai, scikit-learn).

fintech.rationale: Strong data ecosystem; alt: TypeScript for trading APIs / front-end.

granularity.rationale: Sesión = 1 entregable verificable + cierre obligatorio en HITL checkpoint. Trazabilidad de B + governance de D.

auditors_count.rationale: Mínimo robusto para meta-jurado (3 auditores + 1 jury). Más auditores = más coste sin ganancia marginal.

auditor_mode.rationale: Independencia entre auditores + síntesis IA del jurado. HITL solo cuando ≥2 auditores discrepan.

dashboard.rationale: Sin servidor; regenera en cada commit; consultable en navegador local. Equilibrio entre utilidad y coste.

language_pair.rationale: Prosa, decisiones, informes en español (legibilidad humana, regulador AESIA). Código, tests, identifiers en inglés (interoperabilidad).

git_init.rationale: No se asume; el usuario debe responder explícitamente.

target_path.rationale: Subcarpeta del directorio actual con el nombre del sistema.

skills_needed.note: El usuario puede dejarlo vacío y añadir skills sesión por sesión.

executor_platform.rationale: Default = Tier A portability. Si el usuario nombra un platform específico, se añade la capa de conveniencia .claude/* (Tier B) además del runtime portable.

token_budget_per_session.rationale: Holgado para Sonnet/Opus 200K context con buffer. Reduce a 150000 si usas un modelo menor.

library_freshness_threshold_days.rationale: Re-fetch semanal balancea freshness vs ruido. Domínios fast-moving (LLM SDKs) recomendado: 3 días. Domínios estables: 30 días.

stakeholders_template.value:
- Sponsor: [TODO]
- Product owner: [TODO]
- End-user representative: [TODO]
- Compliance / legal: [TODO]
- Tech lead: [TODO]

goals_placeholder.value:
G1 | [métrica] | [target] | confidence ≈[%]
G2 | [métrica] | [target] | confidence ≈[%]
G3 | [métrica] | [target] | confidence ≈[%]

out_of_scope_placeholder.value:
- [Cosa que NO haremos #1]
- [Cosa que NO haremos #2]
- [Cosa que NO haremos #3]

risks_placeholder.value:
R1 | [riesgo] | prob ≈[%] | impact [low/med/high] | mitigation [TODO]
R2 | [riesgo] | prob ≈[%] | impact [low/med/high] | mitigation [TODO]
R3 | [riesgo] | prob ≈[%] | impact [low/med/high] | mitigation [TODO]

sessions_plan_placeholder.value:
S0002 | [primer entregable post-bootstrap] | est [min]–[max] min | KPIs: [...]
S0003 | [...] | est [...]
S0004 | [...] | est [...]

seeds.rationale: Convención de academia (42), hex/leet (1337), pi-related (31415). Tres seeds permite triplicate runs sin colisión común.

compute_env.rationale: Placeholder seguro; el usuario debe confirmar al primer despliegue.

calibration_rules_inherited: All defaults above carry confidence_pct. The interview agent surfaces the default WITH its confidence and rationale; user accepts, adjusts, or overrides freeform.

context_setup_enabled.rationale: Phase 1.5 default ON; the calibrated source corpus pays off across the entire project. Disabling is allowed for tiny scoped runs.

playwright_available.rationale: Conservative default (most runtimes lack mcp.playwright). When false, the curator falls back to fetch() + download_recommendations.md.

db_format.rationale: SQLite (stdlib in Python; CLI on every OS) + FTS5 for similarity search; MD mirror for git-diff visibility. Best of both.

learn_threshold.rationale: Calibrated against pilot runs: ≈15 corrections produces a substantial-yet-actionable batched proposal. Range 5-50.

enabled.rationale: Default ON. Per-task and per-session adaptive panels protect against late-stage drift; opt-out only when running deliberately leanest mode.

v0_1_0.rationale: Default OFF (v0.2.0 fully enabled). Set to true only to skip phases 1.5 / 11.5 / 13.5 / 13.7 / adaptive_audit_meta for legacy compatibility.

negotiation_enabled.rationale: Phase 4.5 default ON. Memory is the foundation; a per-project contract reduces silent gaps AND noise pollution. The mandatory memory_completeness_auditor reads the contract on every task and every session. Off → audits only the Anthropic 4-typed baseline.
